proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = 1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = 1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(b, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = 1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(1, a)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = 1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(a, 1)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0.gcd(x1) = 1 = x0.coprime(x1) }(a, b)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0.divides(x1) or x0.divides(x1 * x2) }(a, a, c)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0.divides(x1) or not x0.divides(x2) or x0.divides(x1.gcd(x2)) }(a, a * c, b * c)
not a.divides(b * c) or not a.coprime(b)
